text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Hishi Akebono's debut race is finally
here.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That's Hishi Akebono?! She's towering over the others!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Incredible, right? I can't wait for the race to start!
She'll be a sight to see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fans gathered around the paddock can't help
but be amazed by Hishi Akebono's impressive
height and size!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do my best! This is the first step toward
my dream of becoming like chanko, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, Hishi Akebono takes in a deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hellooo, everyone! I'm Hishi Akebono! As you can
see, I'm a pretty big racer, at 180 cm tall!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take everyone on and go all-out in
today's race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll stay hungry and wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono gives a hearty wave toward the
audience as the curtain rises on her debut race!
